Class PixelDriftGUI

java.lang.Object
gameGUI.PixelDriftGUI
All Implemented Interfaces:
ActionListener, ItemListener, KeyListener, MouseListener, EventListener
public class PixelDriftGUI extends Object implements KeyListener, MouseListener, ActionListener, ItemListener
PixelDriftGUI.java Code Description: This is the GUI class that will run the Pixel Drift Game

    Field
    Description
    static final int
    TIME_TO_UPDATE
    Time between game updates in milliseconds.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    actionPerformed(ActionEvent e)
    This method is used to load the gamemode and the track selection, only used when playButton is clicked
    void
    itemStateChanged(ItemEvent e)
    This method is only called when a JRadioButton is selected.
    void
    keyPressed(KeyEvent e)
    Handles key press events and activates movement flags.
    void
    keyReleased(KeyEvent e)
    Handles key release events and deactivates movement flags.
    void

    Required method, not implemented

    Main so we can run the game which calls the PixelDriftGUI constructor

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Main so we can run the game which calls the PixelDriftGUI constructor
      Parameters:
      args - , the code being run

    • run

      public void run()
      Called repeatedly by the Timer to update the game state. Handles movement controls and redraws the screen.

    • keyPressed

      public void keyPressed(KeyEvent e)
      Handles key press events and activates movement flags.
      Specified by:
      keyPressed in interface KeyListener
      Parameters:
      e - key event triggered by the user

    • keyReleased

      public void keyReleased(KeyEvent e)
      Handles key release events and deactivates movement flags.
      Specified by:
      keyReleased in interface KeyListener
      Parameters:
      e - key event triggered by the user

    • itemStateChanged

      public void itemStateChanged(ItemEvent e)
      This method is only called when a JRadioButton is selected. It reassigns the respective selected button for each group of buttons.
      Specified by:
      itemStateChanged in interface ItemListener
      Parameters:
      e - the event to be processed

    • actionPerformed

      public void actionPerformed(ActionEvent e)
      This method is used to load the gamemode and the track selection, only used when playButton is clicked
      Specified by:
      actionPerformed in interface ActionListener
      Parameters:
      e - the event to be processed
